name: Coeur a La Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese and cottage cheese together until smooth.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar and vanilla, stirring continuously until well combined.
3. Gently fold in the whipping cream until incorporated.
4. Line a heart-shaped mold with cheesecloth.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared mold and refrigerate for 12 hours to allow it to drain and set.
6. After chilling, carefully turn out the mixture onto a platter.
7. Garnish with fresh strawberries or raspberries before serving.
